title: VisualBERT: A Simple and Performant Baseline for Vision and Language
note: Provides a baseline for joint image-region and text-token transformer pretraining.

title: SimVLM: Simple Visual Language Model Pretraining with Weak Supervision
note: Uses a simple prefix language modeling objective for weakly supervised VLM pretraining.

title: Multimodal Few-Shot Learning with Frozen Language Models
note: Shows how image embeddings can condition a frozen language model.

title: ClipCap: CLIP Prefix for Image Captioning
note: Maps CLIP image embeddings into a language-model prefix for captioning.

title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
note: Uses gated cross-attention to inject visual features into a language model.

title: CoCa: Contrastive Captioners are Image-Text Foundation Models
note: Combines contrastive image-text learning with caption generation.

title: An Empirical Study of GPT-3 for Few-Shot Knowledge-Based VQA
note: Uses prompting and GPT-3 for knowledge-based visual question answering.

title: Socratic Models: Composing Zero-Shot Multimodal Reasoning with Language
note: Composes vision and language models through language as a multimodal interface.
